payload.answer: No durable memory committed. This appears to be a duplicate Slack delivery of the same event.
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for - Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans

entity_resolution.reason: The input indicates the same Slack event ID was delivered twice; this is a transport retry/duplicate, not new durable information.

repair_options: If this was intended to add a new memory, resend a distinct event ID with the original content.
If the first delivery was incorrect, send an explicit correction or deletion for the original event.
